issue.title: Real-time inline validation across IssueFormModal fields (E67)

phases.title: IssueFormModal: extend real-time validation to customBranch + body-hint for Enhance
verification: `IssueFormModal.tsx` exports/uses a module-scope `validateBranchName(name): string | null` helper covering: empty, leading `-`/`.`, trailing `.lock`, `..`, whitespace, and `~ ^ : ? * [ \ @`.
`customBranchTouched` state is added alongside `titleTouched`, reset to false in the modal-open reset block (around line 103–113).

The custom-branch `<input>` wires `onBlur` to set `customBranchTouched(true)`, sets `aria-invalid={showBranchError}` and `aria-describedby={showBranchError ? "custom-branch-error" : undefined}` when invalid.

A `<span id="custom-branch-error" className="issue-form-field-error">` renders beneath the input when `customBranchTouched && branchStrategy === "custom" && validateBranchName(customBranch) !== null`.
A `Add a description to use Enhance with AI` renders beneath the description textarea when `!body.trim() && claudeCliAvailable !== false`.
Submit button's `disabled` predicate extends to `branchStrategy === "custom" && validateBranchName(customBranch) !== null`.
`handleSubmit` gains a pre-submit guard for the custom-branch case that sets `customBranchTouched(true)`, sets the global `error`, and returns early — mirroring the existing title check.
No CSS file is modified — the change reuses existing `.issue-form-field-error` and `.issue-form-field-hint` rules.
`pnpm build` passes; `pnpm test` is green (no regression in the 89-test desktop vitest suite).
Manual smoke verified: custom-branch required + format errors render in real time; description-empty hint appears without disabling state changing.
phases.summary: Added module-scope validateBranchName helper and customBranchTouched state in IssueFormModal.tsx; wired onBlur + aria-invalid/aria-describedby + .issue-form-field-error span on the custom-branch input, rendered the .issue-form-field-hint 'Add a description to use Enhance with AI' beneath the textarea when body is empty and CLI is available, extended submit-button disabled to gate on custom-branch validity, and added a pre-submit guard in handleSubmit. pnpm build (tsc -b + vite) clean; pnpm test green — shared 65, desktop 89, rust 28.
